---
name: Break it
about: Challenge the thinking or the method — where does it fail or mislead?
title: "[Break it] "
labels: ["break-it"]
---

**What's wrong, specifically?**
(Quote the passage or step.)

**Where does it break or mislead?**
(e.g. where "support, not truth" collapses into truth-judging; where a buyer could be misled; an unhandled failure mode.)

**A fix or a sharper alternative, if you have one.**
